case_title: MOUNTAIN LION ACQUISITIONS, INC. VS. NICHOLE C. WILEY et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-19-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOUNTAIN LION ACQUISITIONS, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT WILEY, NICHOLE C. DOES 1 THRU 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-26-2012

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-19-2013 CONTINUED TO JUN-18-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE MAR-19-2013 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE ATTEMPTED TO SERVE NICHOLE C. WILEY FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOUNTAIN LION ACQUISITIONS, INC.
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOUNTAIN LION ACQUISITIONS, INC.
DECLARATION OF DEC OF NON SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT UNABLE TO SERVE NICHOLE C WILEY FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOUNTAIN LION ACQUISITIONS, INC.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOUNTAIN LION ACQUISITIONS, INC.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOUNTAIN LION ACQUISITIONS, INC. SERVED JAN-10-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WILEY, NICHOLE C.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUN-18-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
